title: Bare Bones - Texture Tweaks
description: Small tweaks to Bare Bones that makes the pack more coherent
body:
This pack adds several tweaks and changes to the Bare Bones textures. To either polish the Bare Bones pack, or make changes to textures that needed improving.

The changes are as follows:

- Ice, packed ice, and azalea bushes have been changed so that they are no longer a single colour.
- The bookshelf texture has been changed to better fit in with the chiseled bookshelf block.
- Happy ghasts now look happier.
- The text on the TNT block now uses the galactic standard alphabet (enchanting table language).
- The dragon egg model and texture have been changed to more closely resemble the sniffer egg.
- Armour items now look closer to their worn counterparts.
- Furnaces now have an animation, similar to the smoker. The smoker has been updated so that both are now consistent.
- Lava, water and milk buckets have been given more detail.
- Still water now has a texture and animation.

See the gallery page for all images. 

---

For the happy ghast, if you want to use fresh animations, download this [addon pack.](#)

---

![A before and after shot of a stronghold library, with the retextured bookshelves on the right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emu1eZgQ/images/17a1e1e90d0f7a1e405957aeb6c4c77715336717.png)

![A before and after shot of an ocean, with the after having more detail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/emu1eZgQ/images/6b859bdabc23b25cfdc7204dbe2d7d22618c4dcf.png)
